title: feat(chat): float pending interactive cards above the composer
body:
## Linear
<!-- 建议（非必填）：完整 Linear URL -->
_None yet — can be linked when an issue is filed._

## Summary

Move **pending** interactive card-kit cards (`buttons` / `select`) out of the scrolling message list and **float them above the live input composer** — the way Claude Code surfaces an interactive prompt near its input. The composer stays usable (non-blocking): you can click a card action **or** keep typing. Once a card is answered, the server-produced completion **`banner`** renders inline in the transcript as history. Replay is unchanged (cards stay inline, read-only).

This reverses today's behavior, where an unresolved card **hides the whole composer** (`ChatBody.tsx` → `OpenClawChatSurface.tsx`) while the buttons sit buried up in the message bubble.

**This PR opens with the design + plan; implementation lands next as the tasked commits.**

- 📄 Design spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-22-interactive-card-composer-float-design.md`
- 📋 Implementation plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-22-interactive-card-composer-float.md`

### Approach (surface-level, app-side only)

- Two pure selectors (`chat/lib/interactive-card-float.ts`): which pending cards to float, which cards
